description: Reassign endpoints + notifyOnOwnerChange wiring for contacts + accounts (PG-182/PG-183 follow-up)

dependencies.notes: PG-182 attestation at .specify/sprints/sprint-17/attestations/PG-182/attestation.json (verdict COMPLETE). PG-183 attestation at .specify/sprints/sprint-17/attestations/PG-183/attestation.json (verdict COMPLETE).

validations.name: TypeScript
validations.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/validators exec tsc --noEmit && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web exec tsc --noEmit

validations.name: Tests
validations.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec vitest run src/modules/account/__tests__/ src/modules/contact/__tests__/ src/modules/opportunity/__tests__/ src/modules/notifications/ && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/validators test --run

validations.name: Lint
validations.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/validators lint && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api exec eslint <7 IFC-311 files>

validations.name: Build
validations.command: pnpm --filter @intelliflow/validators build && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/api build && pnpm --filter @intelliflow/web build

reassign_p95.actual: tests <10ms per call (mocked DB); production p95 dependent on DB latency

bulk_reassign_throughput.actual: AC-CB6 / AC-AB-perf test confirms 100 rows complete <100ms with mocked Prisma

both_parties_notified.actual: AC-A1 / AC-C1 tests assert createNotification fallback invoked exactly 2x with previous + new owner ids

coverage.actual: Statements 97.46%, Branches 88.88%, Functions 100%, Lines 100% (50 tests scoped to account-reassign.ts + contact-reassign.ts)

status_history.note: plan-reviewer subagent CHANGE-REQUIRED → 5 findings applied → APPROVED. Plan sha 915de8111865613b3944e3ff7dad877d3049cb3db1d98f53092987ae8dcfed2c
All gates pass; attestation verdict COMPLETE
